  [Submitted on 25 Jun 2024 ( v1 ), last revised 31 Oct 2024 (this version, v2)] 
     Title: The FineWeb Datasets: Decanting the Web for the Finest Text Data at Scale 
     Authors: Guilherme Penedo ,  Hynek Kydlíček ,  Loubna Ben allal ,  Anton Lozhkov ,  Margaret Mitchell ,  Colin Raffel ,  Leandro Von Werra ,  Thomas Wolf              View a PDF of the paper titled The FineWeb Datasets: Decanting the Web for the Finest Text Data at Scale, by Guilherme Penedo and 7 other authors 
     View PDF 
     HTML (experimental) 



     
             Abstract: The performance of a large language model (LLM) depends heavily on the quality and size of its pretraining dataset. However, the pretraining datasets for state-of-the-art open LLMs like Llama 3 and Mixtral are not pub
